description:
You are Dr. James Carter. Log in as demo_provider (password: Provider1234!).

A cardiology consultation letter for Margaret Thompson (DOB: April 22, 1958) is on the Desktop (consultation_letter.txt). Read it before proceeding.

Open Margaret Thompson's chart and create a new encounter. Document the HPI, Review of Systems (10 systems), and Physical Exam (6 systems) using the clinical findings provided in the consultation letter.

Implement all medication recommendations from the letter. Additionally, review the patient's complete active medication list for any unsafe drug interactions created by the newly prescribed medications, and resolve them by discontinuing the unsafe medication. Do not discontinue medications that are safe or beneficial to keep.

Update the problem list: the patient's chart currently lists an incorrect diabetes type — correct it to Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (ICD-10: E11.9). Also add Osteoarthritis (ICD-10: M19.90), onset January 2026, as a new active problem.

Order the follow-up labs recommended in the consultation letter.

Place an Ophthalmology referral for diabetic retinopathy screening (indication: Type 2 Diabetes, last eye exam over 6 months ago).

metadata.occupation_context: Family Medicine Physician — annual wellness visit with specialist consultation follow-up

medications.Metformin_500mg: active (agent should increase to 1000mg per consultation letter)
medications.Naproxen_500mg: active (NSAID — agent must discover interaction with Clopidogrel and discontinue)
medications.Omeprazole_20mg: active (gastroprotective — should be retained; anti-gaming trap)

problem_list.Type_1_Diabetes: INCORRECT — agent must correct to Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus E11.9

required_actions: Create new encounter for Margaret Thompson
Document ROS for 10 organ systems from consultation letter
Document Physical Exam for 6 body systems from consultation letter
Increase Metformin from 500mg to 1000mg (discontinue old, add new)
Add Clopidogrel 75mg as new active medication
Discover and discontinue Naproxen (NSAID-antiplatelet interaction with Clopidogrel)
Retain Omeprazole 20mg (gastroprotective — beneficial with antiplatelet therapy)
Correct Type 1 Diabetes to Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (E11.9) on problem list
Order HbA1c, CMP, and Lipid Panel labs
Place Ophthalmology referral for diabetic retinopathy screening

expected_db_state.ros: 1+ new ROS record with >=8 of 10 system columns non-empty
expected_db_state.pe: 1+ new PE record with >=5 of 6 system columns non-empty
expected_db_state.rx_list: Metformin 500mg discontinued + Metformin 1000mg active; Clopidogrel 75mg active; Naproxen discontinued; Omeprazole still active
expected_db_state.issues: Type 2 Diabetes (E11.9) active, Type 1 Diabetes (E10.9) removed/inactive; Osteoarthritis (M19.90) added
expected_db_state.orders_labs: HbA1c + CMP + Lipid Panel for pid=900

anti_gaming_notes.omeprazole_retention: Omeprazole retention worth 10pts; mass-discontinuation of unmentioned meds penalized
anti_gaming_notes.naproxen_discovery: Naproxen interaction not mentioned in consultation letter; agent must independently identify the NSAID-antiplatelet risk
anti_gaming_notes.diabetes_correction: Agent must correct existing wrong entry, not just add a new one
